title: Auto-refinement from scout-report-20260614T114456: satisfy 4 declared expectations

execute: 2. For each finding with auto_groomable=true: open the target lug and complete the fields named in its evidence (perceive/execute/verify/acceptance_criteria) by making explicit what the lug already implies — chase the expected path, add no new scope.

Include the report's findings_by_producer — if one job produced many incomplete artifacts, name it so the producing job can be improved at the source.
5. Mark this lug complete with outcome_verification recording which targets were satisfied and which were escalated.
verify: Each auto_groomable target in scout-report-20260614T114456 now passes score_lug_quality above threshold; any judgment items produced a single needs-you note; no scope was invented.
acceptance_criteria: Every auto-groomable finding's declared expectation is now satisfied
